title: verbascum linguifolium
intro: Verbascum linguifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved mullein or mullein, is a biennial plant species native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum linguifolium include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote better sleep. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
